result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Allrecipes search results page for “caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza,” showing recipe/article cards.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“Search Results For”
“caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza”
“ITALIAN”
“Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza”
“FOOD NEWS AND TRENDS”
“We Tried 47 Kroger Store-Brand Products...”
selected_candidate:
Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza
constraint_evidence:
- Query/topic matches caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza: supported (search box text visible).
- Recipe should be on Allrecipes: supported (site/title and results page visible).
- Must be a pizza recipe: supported for selected candidate (title includes “Pizza”).
- Must involve caramelized onion: not_visible (not shown in visible title/card text).
- Must involve goat cheese: supported (title includes “Goat Cheese”).
- Must have more than 40 reviews: not_visible (no review count shown).
- Must have rating at least 4.5 stars: not_visible (no rating/stars shown).
action_target:
Likely the “Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza” result card/title.
success_signals:
Open a recipe detail page with title, rating stars, and review count.
failure_signals:
Selected result may not mention caramelized onion; no visible rating/review evidence yet.
uncertainty:
The visible result may be only tangentially related to the requested recipe; need to inspect the recipe page or more results for onion/rating/reviews.

args.task: navigate: Explore Allrecipes for a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with more than 40 reviews and a rating of at least 4.5 stars.

args.query: Allrecipes search results visible but agent exits before opening recipe detail and verifying review count/rating constraints

items.summary: The agent completed a search task but did not enforce an explicit user constraint before stopping.
items.fix_hint: Track hard constraints separately from the main goal and verify them against the final page state before returning success.

items.summary: The agent used broad browsing steps instead of applying the available search or filter controls.
items.fix_hint: Prefer task-specific search inputs and filters when the target can be narrowed directly.

args.expected_behavior: Open a candidate recipe detail page and verify the hard constraints: the recipe should be for caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza, with more than 40 reviews and a rating of at least 4.5 stars, before ending the run.
args.actual_behavior: The agent stopped on the search results page after highlighting 'Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza' and exited without checking a recipe detail page or confirming the review count and star rating.
args.regression_rule: When a task includes explicit minimum rating/review constraints, do not terminate from a search results page; inspect the recipe detail page and confirm all hard constraints before reporting completion.

evidence.claim: The task required a caramelized onion and goat cheese pizza recipe with more than 40 reviews and at least 4.5 stars.
At the final step, the page was an Allrecipes search results page showing 'Fig and Goat Cheese Pizza' but no visible rating or review count evidence.
The selected candidate may not mention caramelized onion, and the visible result did not expose the rating/review constraints.
The run ended with an exit message instead of further navigation or verification.

suggested_followups.label: Check recipe details
suggested_followups.message: Open the candidate recipe page and verify title, rating, and review count directly.

suggested_followups.label: Search more specific
suggested_followups.message: Try queries that include 'caramelized onion' to avoid tangential goat cheese results.
